# Support

Thanks for using gup. Here is how to get help.

## Before you ask
- Read the [README](../README.md) and the docs under [doc/](../doc).
- Search the [existing issues](https://github.com/nao1215/gup/issues); your question may already be answered.

## Where to ask
- Usage question: open a [Question issue](https://github.com/nao1215/gup/issues/new?template=question.md).
- Bug: open a [Bug report](https://github.com/nao1215/gup/issues/new?template=bug_report.md), or run `gup bug-report` to start one in your browser.
- Feature idea: open a [Feature request](https://github.com/nao1215/gup/issues/new?template=feature-request.md).

When reporting a problem, include your `gup version`, OS and architecture, the command you ran, and what happened.

## Security
Do not report security issues in public issues. Follow the [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md).
